description: A graphing and analysis tool for data visualization and statistical analysis of layer data, extended for AI-agent workflows.

descriptionFull.title: Provides graphing and analysis capabilities using ECharts and D3 for interactive data visualization and statistical analysis of layer data. Extended to integrate with the MMGIS AI Agent backend.

example.apiBaseUrl: (string) Base URL for the Analysis Tool API endpoint. Required.

name: Analysis

components.name: API Base URL
components.description: Base URL for the Analysis Tool API endpoint (e.g., https://example.com/api). Required for tool to function.

author: yunks128
